name: public_safety_reconciliation_job_oakline_tru_loy
premise: A Public Safety operations center is in a fast-moving incident involving public safety reconciliation job oakline tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the press briefing. Every delay increases life safety, public trust, and proportional action. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Marco Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Marco Alvarez, accountable for a defensible call in Public Safety when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Luc Dubois
agents.identity: I am Luc Dubois, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Public Safety.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the press briefing. Evidence is partial. Marco Alvarez must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Marco Alvarez do?
